title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Fendi Limited
body: "Application number 5147  Applicant Fendi SRL objected to the name used by Fendi Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Fendi Limited is changed to 15883673, Ltd. "
